title: indigastrum parviflorum subsp. occidentale
intro: Indigastrum parviflorum subsp. occidentale, also known as a type of Indigofereae plant, is a medicinal plant native to tropical Africa. It has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of indigo compounds. The health benefits of Indigastrum parviflorum subsp. occidentale include its potential to treat various infections, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared by boiling the leaves in water or infusing them in alcohol to create a medicinal tea or tincture.
